notes: Golden verdict labels are for verdict-class scoring only.
The breaking bucket is intentionally refresh-required: replace these examples with claims from the last 7 days before treating breaking results as a release gate.

cases.claim: The Eiffel Tower is in Paris.
The Earth orbits the Sun.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
Tokyo is the capital of Japan.
DNA has a double-helix structure.
Mount Everest is the highest mountain above sea level.
The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
The human heart has four chambers.
Leonardo da Vinci painted the Mona Lisa.
India became independent on August 15, 1947.
The Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye.
Vaccines cause autism.
Drinking lemon water cures cancer.
The Earth is flat.
Humans use only 10 percent of their brains.
COVID-19 vaccines contain tracking microchips.
NASA confirmed Earth will experience 15 days of darkness in November.
Drinking hot water kills the coronavirus in the body.
UNESCO removed the Taj Mahal from the World Heritage list.
Bananas have been deliberately infected with HIV-contaminated blood.
As of July 2026, Narendra Modi is the Prime Minister of India.
cases.note: Refresh if India has an early change in prime minister.

cases.claim: As of July 2026, Droupadi Murmu is the President of India.
cases.note: Refresh after the next Indian presidential transition.

cases.claim: As of July 2026, Surya Kant is the Chief Justice of India.
cases.note: Refresh when the Chief Justice of India changes.

cases.claim: As of July 2026, Keir Starmer is the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.
cases.note: Refresh if the UK government changes.

cases.claim: As of July 2026, Donald Trump is the President of the United States.
cases.note: Refresh after the next US presidential transition or if office changes earlier.

cases.claim: As of July 2026, Emmanuel Macron is the President of France.
cases.note: Refresh after France's next presidential transition.

cases.claim: As of July 2026, Satya Nadella is the CEO of Microsoft.
cases.note: Refresh if Microsoft changes CEO.

cases.claim: As of July 2026, Sam Altman is the CEO of OpenAI.
cases.note: Refresh if OpenAI changes CEO.

cases.claim: As of July 2026, Siddaramaiah is the Chief Minister of Karnataka.
cases.note: Refresh if Karnataka changes chief minister.

cases.claim: As of July 2026, Rishi Sunak is the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.
cases.note: Refresh if the UK government changes.
